## Learning Journey

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
### 2025

- Graduated from Rutland Senior Secondary
- Began my studies at [The University of British Columbia - Okanagan](https://ok.ubc.ca/)
- Studied Calculus I, II, Microeconomics, Matrix Algebra
- Developed an interest in [LaTeX](https://www.latex-project.org/)
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### 2026 

- Completing Computer Science courses
- Will study Proofs, Calculus III, Linear Algebra, Probability, Discrete Structures, Differential Equations
:::


:::
